description_long: This handbag features a striking geometric pattern in shades of red, pink, and white, reminiscent of traditional woven textiles. The body of the bag is rectangular with a wide, flat front and back, and narrow sides, giving it a structured silhouette. It is equipped with a single, long, thin strap designed for crossbody or shoulder wear, attached to the bag with small metal rings. A small, rounded handle is also present at the top, providing an alternative carrying option. The closure appears to be a metallic clasp or snap located centrally at the top edge. Decorative gold-tone hardware accents the handle and strap attachments, enhancing the bag's elegant appearance.
description: A rectangular handbag with a bold red and white geometric pattern, gold-tone hardware, and both a long strap and a small top handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile, patterned surface, and the attachment of the long strap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full geometric pattern, gold-tone top handle, and the central closure mechanism.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the slim side and strap attachment.
description_view_3: Back view showing the continuous geometric pattern and the back of the top handle.
attribute_strap_type: Single long, thin crossbody or shoulder strap, non-adjustable, attached with metal rings; one small top handle.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Central metallic clasp or snap closure at the top edge.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold-tone hardware on handle and strap attachments.
attribute_pattern: Geometric pattern in red, pink, and white, reminiscent of traditional woven designs.
